title: ilex angustissima
intro: Ilex angustissima, also known as the Mexican holly or narrowleaf holly, is a species of holly native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of ilicin, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex angustissima include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
